title: chrysanthemum alpinum f. pseudomontanum
intro: Chrysanthemum alpinum f. pseudomontanum, also known as the alpine chrysanthemum or mountain chrysanthemum, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headache, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum alpinum f. pseudomontanum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
